name: term_aliases
description: Alternate key strings that resolve to this vocabulary entry. An alias match in V1/V2 resolution is equivalent to a key match.

aiGuidance.purpose: Synonym keys that should resolve to this term. Used to unify multiple tag strings into one defined term without rewriting instance data (alias-merge).
aiGuidance.extraction: List each alias on a separate line or as a comma-separated list.
